LanguageData.Wula_Quest_RecoverItem_Description:
An agent of the Wula has contacted you. They have located an ancient relic containing {0}, guarded by {1} of the {2}.

They wish for you to retrieve this item. In return, they will provide a reward.

The location is at [site_tile_label], [site_tile_distance] days travel from [site_tile_label].
LanguageData.Wula_Quest_RecoverItem_LetterText: You have received a quest request from the Wula.
LanguageData.Wula_Quest_RecoverItem_ItemPickedUp_Text: Your people have retrieved the {0}. You now need to bring it safely back to your colony, and the Wula will send a shuttle to collect it.
LanguageData.Wula_Quest_RecoverItem_ShuttleArrived_Te: The enemies at the quest site have been cleared. The Wula recovery shuttle is en route, please wait for its arrival and load the item.
LanguageData.Wula_Quest_RecoverItem_FailedNoShuttle_T: You left the quest site without loading the {0} onto the recovery shuttle. The Wula are disappointed, and the quest has failed.
